2605.19957.title: World-Ego Modeling for Long-Horizon Evolution in Hybrid Embodied Tasks
2605.19957.paper_summary: World models are widely explored in embodied intelligence, yet they typically predict distinct evolutions of the world and the ego within a single stream, where the world captures persistent instruction-agnostic scene regularities and the ego captures robot-centric instruction-conditioned dynamics. This world-ego entanglement leads to a degradation in long-horizon embodied scenarios, particularly in hybrid tasks with interleaved navigation and manipulation behaviors. In this paper, we introduce \emph{World-Ego Modeling}, a new conceptual paradigm that decomposes future evolution into world and ego components. We define the world-ego boundary from three perspectives, i.e., motion-, semantic-, and intention-based views, and analyze three disentanglement strategies with post-, pre-, and full disentanglement. Further, we instantiate this paradigm as the World-Ego Model (WEM), a unified embodied world model that couples an implicit separate world-ego planner with a cascade-parallel mixture-of-experts (CP-MoE) diffusion generator. To enable rigorous evaluation, we further construct HTEWorld, the first benchmark for long-horizon world modeling with hybrid navigation-manipulation tasks, providing 125K video clips (over 4.5M frames) with fine-grained action annotations and 300 multi-turn evaluation trajectories (over 2K instructions). Extensive experiments show that WEM achieves state-of-the-art performance on HTEWorld while remaining competitive on existing manipulation-only benchmarks.
2605.19957.paper_summary_zh: 世界模型在具身智能中被廣泛探討，但它們通常在單一流中預測世界和自我的不同演變，其中世界捕捉持久的無指令場景規律，而自我則捕捉以機器人為中心的指令條件動態。這種世界-自我糾纏導致在長期具身場景中的退化，特別是在具有交錯導航和操作行為的混合任務中。在本文中，我們介紹了\emph{世界-自我建模}，這是一種新的概念範式，將未來的演變分解為世界和自我組件。我們從三個角度定義世界-自我邊界，即基於運動、語義和意圖的觀點，並分析三種解糾纏策略，包括後解糾纏、前解糾纏和完全解糾纏。此外，我們將這一範式具體化為世界-自我模型（WEM），這是一個統一的具身世界模型，將隱式的獨立世界-自我規劃器與級聯並行的專家混合（CP-MoE）擴散生成器相結合。為了實現嚴格的評估，我們進一步構建了HTEWorld，這是首個針對混合導航-操作任務的長期世界建模基準，提供了125K個視頻片段（超過450萬幀）以及精細的動作註釋和300條多輪評估軌跡（超過2000條指令）。大量實驗表明，WEM在HTEWorld上實現了最先進的性能，同時在現有的僅操作基準上仍保持競爭力。
2605.19957.author: Zuyao Lin et.al.
2605.19957.authors: Zuyao Lin, Jianhui Zhang, Peidong Jia, Xiaoguang Zhao, Shanghang Zhang, Xingyu Chen
